name: Home Assistant
description: Display entity states from Home Assistant via REST API or MQTT Statestream
author: FiestaBoard Team

access_token.title: Long-Lived Access Token
access_token.description: Create in HA: Profile → Long-Lived Access Tokens

mqtt_statestream.title: Enable MQTT Statestream
mqtt_statestream.description: Subscribe to HA Statestream for real-time entity updates via MQTT instead of REST polling. Requires the MQTT Statestream integration in Home Assistant.

statestream_base_topic.title: Statestream Base Topic
statestream_base_topic.description: MQTT topic prefix used by HA Statestream (default: homeassistant/statestream)

statestream_broker_host.title: MQTT Broker Host (optional)
statestream_broker_host.description: Overrides MQTT_BROKER_HOST env var. Leave empty to use the system MQTT broker.

statestream_broker_port.title: MQTT Broker Port (optional)
statestream_broker_port.description: Overrides MQTT_BROKER_PORT env var. Leave empty to use the system MQTT broker port.

env_vars.name: HOME_ASSISTANT_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Home Assistant base URL (not required when using MQTT Statestream mode)

env_vars.name: HOME_ASSISTANT_ACCESS_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Long-lived access token (not required when using MQTT Statestream mode)

dynamic_entities.description: Access any Home Assistant entity dynamically
